name: Can I get permanent disability for chronic neck pain from job injury?

mainEntity.name: Can I get permanent disability for chronic neck pain from job injury?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, after MMI if impairment rated 1-100%; pays scheduled or whole person %.** Utah/Idaho use AMA guides.[5] Key factors: Objective tests; doc rating; retraining if total. Common for fusions. Apply post-healing.
